caption:
The neon rain hissed against the heated glass of my dome. 22°C. Perfect. 😏

They called this the Azure Spire, a luxury resort floating above the slums of Neo-Tokyo, but I knew better. It wasn't water; it was data. And I was here to sell it.

My holographic bikini shimmered in the twilight, holographic fabric clinging to my curves like a second skin. The heat of the summer day lingered, even as the city below roared with electric storms.

I adjusted the strap. A haptic buzz vibrated against my hip—a new message.

'Meet me at the thermal vents,' it read.

The water around me rippled, distorting the view of the chrome-plated walls. My heart pounded, not from cold, but from anticipation. This was the life I wanted. Fast. Hot. Dangerous.

I slipped into the pool, the cool tech-fluid contrasting the fire in my veins. A shadow moved. Not a shadow, but a presence. He emerged from the steam, his suit gleaming, eyes scanning the room with predatory hunger.

'You're early,' he whispered.

'Only a second too soon,' I replied, smiling over the edge of the pool.

The air thickened with ozone and musk. We moved closer, the water lapping at our hips.

He reached out, fingers brushing the holographic fabric of my top. Static electricity sparked between us, a digital kiss.

'Welcome to the edge,' he murmured.

I leaned in. The city screamed, the water whispered, and for a moment, I felt everything, nothing, and everything all at once.

Summer in Neo-Tokyo never sleeps. Not for us.

#CyberpunkQueen #NeonSummer #HoloBikini #TechLover #CyberLove #NeonCity #SummerAdventures #HoloVibes #FutureLove #DigitalDesire
